data.content:
<?php

if (! defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class GU_Scene_Archive_Plugin {
    private static $instance = null;

    private $settings;
    private $content;
    private $record_manager;
    private $search_service;
    private $search_controller;
    private $template_controller;
    private $section_shortcodes;
    private $playlist_shortcodes;
    private $maintenance;
    private $promotion_workflow;
    private $operator_dashboard;

    public static function instance() {
        if (null === self::$instance) {
            self::$instance = new self();
        }

        return self::$instance;
    }

    private function __construct() {
        $this->settings = new GU_Scene_Archive_Settings();
        $this->content = new GU_Scene_Archive_Content();
        $this->record_manager = new GU_Scene_Archive_Record_Manager();
        $this->search_service = new GU_Scene_Archive_Search_Service($this->settings);
        $this->search_controller = new GU_Scene_Archive_Search_Controller($this->settings, $this->search_service);
        $this->template_controller = new GU_Scene_Archive_Template_Controller();
        $this->section_shortcodes = new GU_Scene_Archive_Section_Shortcodes();
        $this->playlist_shortcodes = new GU_Scene_Archive_Playlist_Shortcodes();
        $this->maintenance = new GU_Scene_Archive_Maintenance();
        $this->promotion_workflow = new GU_Scene_Archive_Promotion_Workflow();
        $this->operator_dashboard = new GU_Scene_Archive_Operator_Dashboard($this->promotion_workflow);
    }

    public static function activate() {
        GU_Scene_Archive_Content::register_content_types();
        GU_Scene_Archive_Search_Controller::register_search_route();
        GU_Scene_Archive_Maintenance::activate();
        flush_rewrite_rules();
    }

    public static function deactivate() {
        GU_Scene_Archive_Maintenance::deactivate();
        flush_rewrite_rules();
    }

    public function get_settings() {
        return $this->settings;
    }

    public function get_search_service() {
        return $this->search_service;
    }

    public function get_search_controller() {
        return $this->search_controller;
    }

    public function get_promotion_workflow() {
        return $this->promotion_workflow;
    }

    public function get_operator_dashboard() {
        return $this->operator_dashboard;
    }
}
